chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1553 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 24.10.2016. Mr. Muhammad Jabbar Shaikh, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel alongwith Inspector Tassawar Hussain Jat, SHO P.S Kunri. -.-.-. Today, private respondents are in attendance, who have undertaken that neither they have caused harassment or extended threats to petitioners earlier nor they intend to do so in future. Today, concerned SHO P.S Kunri is also present and besides filing his statement he has also undertaken to provide protection to the petitioners if he is approached with such a request. This petition is disposed of with the directions to all respondents that they should not cause any harassment to the petitioners nor will extend any threats. It is further directed that official respondents shall play their role in providing protection to the petitioner if they are approached with such a request, but strictly in accordance with law and relevant rules. With these observations, present petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
